smtp_port.description: SMTP server port (587 for STARTTLS, 465 for SSL, 1025 for Mailpit)

smtp_user.description: SMTP authentication username (leave blank if no auth)

smtp_use_tls.description: Use STARTTLS when connecting to SMTP server

smtp_from_email.description: From address used for all outgoing emails

smtp_from_name.description: From display name used for all outgoing emails

active_sender.description: Active email sender ID (e.g. smtp, mailchimp)

log_sends.description: Write a log entry for every email sent
